raw_description: Extra ammo and equipment to resupply your team.
Deployable device that launches aerial drones. Drones seek out enemies and explode.
Area defense system destroys enemy projectiles in the air.
Become nearly invisible for a short duration. Attacking ends the effect.
Placed holographic decoy tricks enemies and captures objectives.
Deployed device that boosts score and improves effectiveness of allied operators and gadgets in range.
Disrupts nearby enemy equipment, field upgrades, scorestreaks, and minimaps.
Deployed trap which emits a neurotoxic gas cloud, causing severe hallucinations and disorienting victims.
Field Upgrade that disrupts enemies, equipment, and scorestreaks. Aim continuously at a target to use.
Stealth device which gives you the Ninja, Ghost, and Cold Blooded perks for a duration. The duration extends on kills.
For a duration, fatal damage puts you into a Last Stand state. Teammates can revive you, or get a kill to self-revive.
notes: Mastery action was not visible in the capture.
